name: Pineapple Breakfast Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 (8 1/4 oz.) can Crushed pineapple - use remaining 1/2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon and salt.
2. Cut in butter until coarse crumbs are formed.
3. Add undrained pineapple and buttermilk, mix until it holds together.
4. Turn dough out onto lightly floured surface. Knead for 2 minutes.
5. Shape dough into a 6-inch circle, transfer to an 8-inch greased round cake pan.
6. Score the top in quarters.
7. Bake at 375 degrees F (190 degrees C) for 30-35 minutes.
8. Serve warm with pineapple cream cheese spread.
